name: Aur-Emershore
personality: Glowing softly beneath a wizard hat, Aur-Emershore's ° serene eyes focus with luminous intensity on the one line causing all the pain, systematically bisecting the bug while the hat spins impressively. This duck has nothing snarky to say and considers that a feature.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
